title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Explodes 133% to $1.66, Surges Into Top 120 Cryptocurrencies
excerpt: RaveDAO has delivered explosive gains of over 133% in the past 24 hours, catapulting the token to $1.66 and securing a spot at #116 in market cap rankings. The dramatic price surge has captured significant attention in the crypto community as RAVE continues its remarkable upward trajectory.
